title: TaskNotification
description: Parsed Task/Agent tool result. Populated by getSessionTaskNotifications() from any user entry whose content contains a <task-notification> XML block.

toolUseId.description: tool_use_id of the Agent/Task tool_use that produced this notification.

summary.description: Optional one-line summary emitted by the task.

outputFile.description: Optional path to a file containing the full task output.
